seo_title: Custom Patches and Stickers — No Bulk Minimum
seo_description: Custom patches, stickers, and merch with minimum order of one. Upload your art. Preview your proof. Order for artists, businesses, events, and gifts. Rebecca: refine this description.

faqs.q: Can I really order just one?
faqs.a: Yes. Through our promo-on-demand supplier, the minimum order is one unit on most items including patches and stickers.

faqs.q: How does the proof preview work?
faqs.a: Upload your art or logo when you submit an inquiry. We send you a mockup before production begins. You approve it — then we order.
Patches, stickers, tumblers, shirts, pens, pint glasses, and 70+ more items. Start with patches and stickers — they ship well, store flat, and people actually use them.
